description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem buses. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr, rarray = agenbusreal(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem buses to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the bus and/or plant quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

flag.description: for only in-service plant buses (type code 2 or 3) with at least one in-service machine.
for only in-service plant buses (type code 2 or 3), including those with no in- service machines.
for all in-service buses, including those that are not plant buses.
for all plant buses, including those with no in-service machines.
for all buses, including those that are not plant buses.

string.description: Bus base voltage in kV.
Actual bus voltage magnitude, in pu.
Actual bus voltage magnitude, in kV (in pu if base voltage is 0.0).
Bus voltage phase angle, in radians.
Bus voltage phase angle, in degrees.
MVA loading as a percentage of total plant MVA base, MBASE.
Regulated bus base voltage, in kV.
Actual regulated bus voltage magnitude, in pu.
Actual regulated bus voltage magnitude, in kV (in pu if base voltage is 0.0).
Regulated bus scheduled voltage magnitude, in pu.
Regulated bus scheduled voltage magnitude, in kV (in pu if base voltage is 0.0).
Percent of total Mvar to be contributed by this plant.
Active power output of in-service machines at this plant, in MW.
Reactive power output of in-service machines at this plant, in Mvar.
abs(PGEN+jQGEN) of in-service machines at this plant, in MVA.
Active power upper limit of in-service machines at this plant, in MW.
Active power lower limit of in-service machines at this plant, in MW.
Reactive power upper limit of in-service machines at this plant, in Mvar.
Reactive power lower limit of in-service machines at this plant, in Mvar.
Bus mismatch, in MVA (0.0 if bus type code > 3).
Active power output of in-service machines at this plant (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power output of in-service machines at this plant (units determined by power output options).
abs(PGEN+jQGEN) of in-service machines at this plant (units determined by power output options).
Active power upper limit of in-service machines at this plant (units determined by power output options).
Active power lower limit of in-service machines at this plant (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power upper limit of in-service machines at this plant (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power lower limit of in-service machines at this plant (units determined by power output options).
Bus mismatch (0.0 if bus type code > 3) (units determined by power output options).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
